title: Rescue Dogs vs Aliens Tower Defense
description:
RDVA-TD: Rescue Dogs vs Aliens is a colorful tower defense game where brave rescue dogs stand between Earth and an alien invasion.

Place dog-powered defenses, unlock new towers and heroes, upgrade your strategy, and hold the line across a growing collection of maps. Each battlefield brings new paths, enemy types, terrain challenges, and escalating waves of alien attackers.

Build your defense, manage resources, protect your health buildings, and push deeper into an increasingly chaotic campaign of dogs, aliens, lasers, traps, explosions, and heroic last stands.

Features

• Classic tower defense gameplay with a rescue-dog twist

• 80 waves of escalating alien attacks

• Multiple maps with distinct terrain and layouts

• Dozens of towers, upgrades, heroes, and special buildings

• Ground, flying, burrowing, stealth, boss, and titan enemies

• Persistent progression with unlocks, treats, XP, and shelter upgrades

• Adjustable difficulty for casual play or tougher strategic runs

• Single-player, keyboard-and-mouse strategy gameplay

• Play with traditional tower defense pathing or with Alien wandering where some aliens leave the path to get around your defenses and mitigate area of effect attacks. 

Supporting Real Dog Rescue

A portion of our net revenue from this game supports real-world dog rescue efforts, including organizations that help dogs in high-risk shelters and provide care for shelter dogs. We will share donation updates through our official channels after launch.
description_short: Command heroic rescue dogs in a colorful tower defense battle against alien invaders. Build, upgrade, unlock heroes, defend strange battlefields, and survive wave after wave in RDVA-TD: Rescue Dogs vs Aliens.
